pageContext.name: Cthulhu
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Nemesis Now present the James Ryan Green Cthulhu Ornament Figurine!   Exclusively designed for Nemesis Now by internationally renowned Gothic and Fantasy artist James Ryman, this monstrous figurine holds the spirit of Cthulhu. He is said to resemble a human octopus and stands hundreds of meters tall, with webbed human-looking arms and kegs and a pair of rudimentary wings on his back. It is no surprise that Lovecraftian's worship him.  In this version, the mighty deity is emerald green in color and sits atop a large monument, eyes piercing all those who gaze upon him. Cast in the finest resin before being lovingly hand-painted, this piece would make a fantastic gift for anyone who has an obsession with the classics of horror.  Don't miss your chance to add this figurine to your collection today!
